info.title: FlexOps API - Core Services Documentation

get.summary: Validates an address using the DHL Express API.
Gets DHL identifiers for a given account.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of identifiers to retrieve.

post.summary: Uploads an invoice to DHL.
Calculates landed cost using the DHL Express API.

get.summary: Gets DHL service points near a location.

post.summary: Creates a DHL pickup request.

parameters.name: requestorName
parameters.description: The name of the person requesting cancellation.

get.summary: Gets available DHL products for a shipment.

parameters.name: isCustomsDeclarable
parameters.description: Whether the shipment is customs declarable.

get.summary: Gets DHL shipping rates for a single-piece shipment.

parameters.name: isCustomsDeclarable
parameters.description: Whether the shipment is customs declarable.

post.summary: Gets DHL multi-piece shipping rates.
Screens a shipment using the DHL Express API.
Creates a DHL shipment.

get.summary: Gets the electronic proof of delivery for a DHL shipment.

post.summary: Uploads paperless trade images for a DHL shipment.
Uploads invoice data for a DHL shipment.

get.summary: Gets a document image for a DHL shipment.

parameters.name: levelOfDetail
parameters.description: The level of detail (e.g., all, shipment).

parameters.name: levelOfDetail
parameters.description: The level of detail (e.g., all, shipment).

parameters.name: fileName
parameters.description: The name of the file with extension, i.e. "TestFile.Pdf".

post.summary: Posts the inventory update.

get.summary: Gets the individual order status by order number.

post.summary: Posts the new ship label order.

get.summary: Gets the single ups tracking detail.

post.summary: Performs a ups address verify.
Performs the ups rate shopping.
Generates the new ups ship label.

Rates a UPS pickup.

get.summary: Gets the pending status of a UPS pickup.
Gets the political divisions for a country from UPS.

post.summary: Searches UPS pickup service center locations.
Searches UPS locations.
Gets UPS transit times for a shipment.
Uploads a paperless document to UPS.
Pushes a document to the UPS image repository.

delete.summary: Deletes a paperless document from UPS.

post.summary: Gets chemical reference data from UPS.
Gets an acceptance audit pre-check from UPS for dangerous goods.
Sends a pre-notification for dangerous goods to UPS.
Gets a landed cost quote from UPS.
Creates a TForce freight shipment via UPS.
Gets a TForce freight rate quote from UPS.
Creates a TForce freight pickup via UPS.
